mapper.select: merge into song as t using ( values (#{input.id}::bigint, #{input.title}::text, coalesce(#{input.details}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{input.albumId}::bigint) ) as s(id, title, details, album_id) on (t.id = s.id) or (t.title = s.title and t.album_id = s.album_id) when matched then update set title = coalesce(s.title, t.title), details = merge_details(t.details, s.details), album_id = coalesce(s.album_id, t.album_id) when not matched then insert (title, details, album_id) values (s.title, s.details, s.album_id) returning t.id, t.title, t.details, t.album_id, merge_action() as action

select s.id, s.title, case when (s.details->>'trackNumber' ~ '^\d+$') then (s.details->>'trackNumber')::int end track_number, s.album_id from song s where
#{id}
